creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry that this PR didn't get attention at the time it was submitted, but it's lacking useful info.  Particularly,
- what you did after booting the installation image,
- what changed in the MBR.

Obviously an installation image isn't supposed to modify disks unless requested.  If you can reproduce this with a modern version of FreeBSD and provide some details, please re-open the bug report.
